attributes.body_preview_2000c:
class PromotionBlockedError(Exception):
	    pass
	

	def check_promotion_eligibility(receipt):
	    if receipt.powered is False and receipt.n_mut < 15:
	        raise PromotionBlockedError(
	            f"{receipt.gene}/{receipt.axis}: promotion blocked — "
	            f"underpowered cohort (n={receipt.n_mut} < 15)"
	        )
	9.4 Test Specification
def test_fancm_pending_review():
	    receipt = get_candidate_receipt("FANCM", "parp_inhibitors")
	    assert receipt.status == "PENDING_REVIEW"
	    assert receipt.powered is False
	

	def test_fancm_promotion_blocked():
	    """Fuser CANNOT promote FANCM above Mechanistic."""
	    result = fuser.compute_tier("FANCM", CandidateAxis.PARP_INHIBITORS)
	    assert "Mechanistic" in result.tier or "Not supported" in result.tier
	    assert result.tier != "Strong"
	

	def test_audit_queue_underpowered():
	    response = client.get("/api/v1/audit/queue", params={"filter": "underpowered"})
	    genes = [e["gene"] for e in response.json()["entries"]]
	    assert "FANCM" in genes
	    assert "FANCC" in genes
	    assert "H2AFX" in genes
